testsuite.name: com.assetguard.presentation.routes.AIAssistantRoutesTest

testcase.name: GET history returns empty messages array when no history
POST chat with BUSINESS userType passes correct type to usecase
POST chat with null deepLink returns null in response
GET history with limit param passes limit to usecase
POST chat returns 200 with reply and deepLink
POST chat with invalid userType falls back to DEFAULT
